_meta.description: UX clarification prompts for editing flows — selection, range, and ambiguity resolution.

no_selection_confirm.en: No selection provided. I'll apply to {{fallbackScope}} — confirm?
no_selection_confirm.pt: Nenhuma selecao fornecida. Vou aplicar em {{fallbackScope}} — confirmar?

range_required.en: This action needs a range (e.g., {{exampleRange}}). Select a range or type it.
range_required.pt: Esta acao precisa de um intervalo (ex.: {{exampleRange}}). Selecione ou digite um intervalo.

ambiguous_target.en: I found {{candidateCount}} possible targets. Which one should I edit?
ambiguous_target.pt: Encontrei {{candidateCount}} alvos possiveis. Qual deles devo editar?
